hooks.command: echo '[AUTO-GATE] Commit attempt detected. BEFORE committing, you MUST run: 1) @code-reviewer on all changed files 2) @security-auditor on auth/security changes 3) @test-strategist to verify test coverage. Do NOT proceed with commit until all applicable agents have passed.'
echo '[AUTO] Source file edited. After you finish the current task, run @code-reviewer on changed files before committing.'
echo '[AUTO] New source file created. Run @security-auditor and @test-strategist on this file before committing.'

echo '[AUTO-CHECKLIST] Session ending. Verify: 1) All code changes reviewed by @code-reviewer 2) Security-sensitive changes audited by @security-auditor 3) Tests exist for new code via @test-strategist 4) DB changes validated by @sql-expert 5) Documentation updated by @documentation-writer if public API changed.'
